SR5CF.DeleteFolderConfirm: Delete this folder? Items inside will move back to the section root.
SR5CF.DropAnyItemHere: Drag any item here to attach as modification

Settings.EnableFoldersHint: Show the + button to create custom folders on the character sheet.
Settings.EnableUniversalModsHint: Adds a 'Modifications' tab to every item sheet, accepting any item as a nested modification.
Settings.AllowRecursiveModsHint: If enabled, items already used as modifications can themselves contain further modifications (recursive).
Settings.EnableSearchHint: Adds a search box to each actor-sheet tab (one combined search per tab; inventory searches all item categories at once).

Errors.FolderExists: A folder with this name already exists.

SR5CF.CompendiumFolder: Compendium folder (read-only, mirrored from the source pack)
